subject: math
prompt: An object is launched from a height of 139 feet above the ground. A quadratic function $f$ models the height above the ground, in feet, of the object $t$ seconds after it is launched. questionText: An object is launched from a height of 139 feet above the ground. A quadratic function $f$ models the height above the ground, in feet, of the object $t$ seconds after it is launched. According to the model, 2 seconds after the object is launched, it reaches a maximum height of 203 feet above the ground. Which equation defines $f$?
